name: token-goat
summary: Token optimizer for Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode, and openclaw (Windows, macOS, Linux, WSL). Shrinks oversized images, skips re-reads of session-touched files, compresses noisy output via 130 built-in filters, rebuilds context after compaction. CLI commands (symbol, read, section, semantic, skeleton, map, baseline) replace full-file reads with narrow extracts; surgical slices prevent subagent window overflow.
author: DFK Helper LLC
